mapper.select: SELECT sr.role_code FROM sys_role sr INNER JOIN sys_user_role sur ON sr.id = sur.role_id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.deleted = 0
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
